steps_raw.instruction: Weigh out 6 g of air-dried soil in triplicate into a labeled 50 mL falcon tube
Thaw ~ 20 mL sample prior to filtering
Add 30 mL of Ultrapure DI (maintaining a 2 g to 10 mL ratio) using large pipette
Place samples onto orbital shaker for 2 rpm, °C, 2 hours
Once completed centrifuge samples at 6000 rpm, , 8 minutes
If samples are still cloudy, centrifuge a second time
Transfer the supernatant to two centrifuge tubes and do not discard the soil pellet
5 mL in a 15 mL centrifuge tube for FT-ICR-MS
~ 20 mL in a 50 mL centrifuge tube for TOC/TN and LC-MS
Acidify the FT-ICR-MS subsample using 2 µL of concentrated phosphoric acid (37%)
Freeze the TOC/TN and LC-MS sample on the side at -20 °C until filtration
Freeze FT-ICR-MS samples on their side in the -80 °C until SPE
SPE Protocol: Gilson Automated SPE Protocol
Using a new clean syringe for each sample, pull up 50 mL up Ultrapure DI water
Attach a new 0.45 um filter to the syringe and press the water through the filter to rinse the filter.
Remove the filter without touching the tip and pull up the ~ 20 mL of thawed sample
Re attach the rinsed filter and discard the first 1 - 2 mL of sample filtered
Filter the sample into two falcon tubes, two 15 mL tube labeled for TOC and LC-MS respectively.
Filter 10 mL of solution into the LC-MS tube and all remaining sample into the TOC/TN tube.

If the filter becomes difficult to press sample through, rinse a new filter using a clean (DI ONLY syringe using steps 3 and 4) and attach the rinsed filter to the syringe with sample. Discard the first 1 - 2 mL and continue filtering into the respective tubes.
Store filtered samples in the freezer prior to analyses.
